content.fact_text: Implementation of a robust, production-ready ConfigurationProvider for the inventory reconciliation service.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a singleton configuration provider that validates environment variables against a Zod schema upon application startup. It provides methods for safe configuration retrieval, diagnostic reporting, and PII-aware log redaction.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, type-safe, and immutable configuration service for the inventory reconciliation component, ensuring runtime environment settings are validated against schemas before system startup.
